calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up As To Cross Complaint.
Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Olie Marie Victoire, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Atty. Edward McCutchen, Esq. for Defendants and Cross-Complainants BETTE JO CARR-WALTON & WALTON & WALTON REAL ESTATE.
Defendant and Cross-Complainant Bette Jo Carr-Walton was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony, considering of the Exhibits and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Defendant and Cross Complainants Bette Jo Carr-Walton and Walton & Walton Real Estate shall have judgment with respect to their March 20, 2006 Cross-Complaint for Indemnification, Equitable Contribution, Apportionment of Fault and Attorney's Fees against defendant/Cross-defendant TIRRELL MUHAMMED AKA TIRRELL BURDEN AS FOLLOWS:

Special damages - $160,000
Prejudgment Interest - $5,803.13
Cost of suit - $220.00
TOTAL JUDGMENT - 166,050.13
The court further finds that the conduct ot Tirrell Muhameed aka Tirrell Burden was purposeful, intentional, malicious and fraudulent with respect to this judgment.
Judgment signed in Open Court.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd., As To Co-Defendant: Muhamed.
Off Calendar May-01-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia Abalos.
Robert Epstein, Esq. for Plaintiff: Gordon Greenwood, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
Plaintiff's Default Judgment Hearing Statement, rec'd and filed in court.
Plaintiff's request correcting the Defendant's name to: Tirrell Muhammad, granted in open court.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Tirrell Muhammad aka Tirrell Burden as follows:
Total Damages (includes interest to date of this judgment) $328,460.00
Costs and Fees pursuant to memo. of costs.
Judgment signed in open court.
